properties.SQL Query:
SELECT
  CUSTOMER_SK AS PK_DIM,
  CUSTOMER_UNIQUE_ID AS CUSTOMER_UNIQUE_ID_R,
  CUSTOMER_ID AS CUSTOMER_ID_R,
  DATE_TO,
  IS_CURRENT
FROM DIM_CUSTOMER
WHERE CUSTOMER_UNIQUE_ID = '${CustomerUniqueID}'
AND IS_CURRENT = 1
AND DATE_TO IS NULL

properties.SQL Statement:
INSERT INTO DIM_CUSTOMER
(
  CUSTOMER_ID,
  CUSTOMER_UNIQUE_ID,
  NAME,
  GENDER,
  AGE,
  AGE_GROUP,
  PHONE,
  ZIP_CODE_PREFIX,
  CITY,
  STATE,
  DATE_FROM,
  DATE_TO,
  IS_CURRENT
)
VALUES
(
  '${CustomerID_sql}',
  '${CustomerUniqueID_sql}',
  '${Name_sql}',
  '${Gender_sql}',
  ${Age_sql},
  '${age_group}',
  '${Phone_sql}',
  '${Zip_sql}',
  '${City_sql}',
  '${State_sql}',
  SYSDATE,
  NULL,
  1
)

UPDATE DIM_CUSTOMER
SET
  DATE_TO = SYSDATE,
  IS_CURRENT = 0
WHERE CUSTOMER_SK = ${CustomerSK}
